title: Values, Types, Coercion, and Equality · Runtime Trace: Number Semantics
summary: Normalize prices, quantities, identifiers, optional fields, and validity signals from a mixed service-data feed. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js number semantics increment in a value-normalization and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle IEEE-754 precision, NaN, Infinity, safe integers, parsing, rounding, and decimal-sensitive decisions.
Choose strict equality, Object.is, or collection sameness based on NaN, signed zero, identity, and domain needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
